title: Savory Velvety Croatian Beef Burger
description: A savory and velvety Croatian-inspired beef burger featuring sesame seed burger buns, served with a side of ajvar sauce. This dish is egg-free and perfect for a monsoon evening.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, combine ground beef, salt, and pepper. Mix well with your hands or a wooden spoon until just combined.
Divide the beef mixture into 4 equal parts and shape each part into a ball. Flatten each ball into a patty.
Grill the patties for 4-5 minutes per side, or until they reach an internal temperature of 130°F for medium-rare.
While the burgers are cooking, toast the sesame seed burger buns on the grill or in a toaster.
Spread a layer of ajvar sauce on the bottom bun of each burger.
Assemble the burgers with caramelized onions, mushrooms, swiss cheese, lettuce, and tomato.
Let the burgers rest for a few minutes before serving to allow the juices to redistribute.
